name: Capital One Café
description_short: Capital One Café is a credit repair provider based in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. Rated 4.1/5 with 887 Google reviews, reflecting strong customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Capital One Café is a credit repair provider serving clients in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. With 887 Google reviews and a 4.1/5.0 rating, Capital One Café has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Operating as a coffee shop, bank, Capital One Café provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Philadelphia, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Capital One Café operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Philadelphia, Pennsylvania area who are considering Capital One Café should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
